title: EU AI Act — risk tiers (unacceptable / high / limited / minimal risk)

artifact_plan.diagram_intent: Four-tier risk pyramid: apex 'Unacceptable (banned)', then 'High (heavily regulated)', then 'Limited (transparency)', wide base 'Minimal (no mandatory rules)'. Each tier labeled with risk level + the law's response + one example; width conveys population (few banned, most minimal).
artifact_plan.suggested_profile_signals: framework with four named tiers; Core Concepts 4 tier sub-concepts + pillar linkage; no Implementation/algorithm; maps to one coherent structure (risk pyramid); mid-length explanatory topic.

depth_signals: Standard — 4 risk-tier sub-concepts + four-pillar linkage, single hierarchy structure (risk pyramid), no algorithm; reading ~1200-1600w; diagram = 4-tier pyramid.
